rationale: The cited paper studies economy/premium private-label introductions and context effects in brand choice (mixed logit natural experiment in two UK categories), while the citing paper studies intrayear demand cycles and advertising/price elasticities for national brands using VARX across 61 categories. This topic/method mismatch suggests the citation may be background, but the provided evidence includes only a DOI-level match with no in-text citation context, so there is not enough to safely drop as obvious mention-only.
